commands.label: Blog: New Post
commands.description: Create a new Swift Publish post with a timestamped draft title.

commands.label: Blog: Upload Active Image to Gyazo
commands.description: Upload the active image file to Gyazo, print Markdown, and copy it to the clipboard.

args: markdown=$(python3 scripts/upload_image_to_gyazo.py "$1") || exit $?; printf '%s\n' "$markdown"; printf '%s' "$markdown" | pbcopy

commands.label: Blog: Replace Local Images with Gyazo URLs
commands.description: Upload draft-local images to Gyazo and rewrite Markdown image URLs.

commands.label: Blog: Prepare for Deploy
commands.description: Upload draft images, build the site, and check generated output.

commands.label: Blog: Deploy
commands.description: Deploy Output to tanabe1478.github.io and run public smoke checks.
